summary: Completed testing of GERdoctor iteration 19 - Step Duration & Estimated Completion feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. Backend: GET /api/steps/estimated-completion returns estimated_completion date, GET /api/admin/users returns estimated_completion for each user, GET /api/partner/submissions returns estimated_completion for each submission, GET /api/admin/steps returns duration_value and duration_unit, PUT /api/admin/steps/{id} can update duration fields. Frontend: User dashboard shows 'Voraussichtlicher Abschluss' banner with date in DD.MM.YYYY format, Admin user list shows 'Forecast' column, Admin step editor shows duration fields (Wert + Einheit), Admin step list shows 'Dauer' info (Sofort, 4 Wochen, 3 Monate), Partner submissions table shows 'Forecast' column.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/admin/steps returns duration_value and duration_unit for all 8 steps
BACKEND: Seeded durations match expected (Step 1=0d, Step 2=0d, Step 3=4w, Step 4=0d, Step 5=0d, Step 6=3m, Step 7=0d, Step 8=2w)
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/steps/{id} can update duration_value and duration_unit
BACKEND: GET /api/steps/estimated-completion returns valid ISO date (26.08.2026 for demo user)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/users returns estimated_completion field for all users
BACKEND: GET /api/partner/submissions returns estimated_completion for each submission
FRONTEND: User dashboard shows 'Voraussichtlicher Abschluss' banner with data-testid='estimated-completion-banner'
FRONTEND: Estimated completion date displayed in DD.MM.YYYY format (26.08.2026)
FRONTEND: Admin user list shows 'Forecast' column header
FRONTEND: Admin user list shows forecast dates for all users (6 dates found)
FRONTEND: Admin step list shows 'Dauer: Sofort' for instant steps
FRONTEND: Admin step list shows 'Dauer: 4 Wochen' for Step 3
FRONTEND: Admin step list shows 'Dauer: 3 Monate' for Step 6
FRONTEND: Admin step editor shows 'Dauer dieses Schritts' section with Wert and Einheit fields
FRONTEND: Duration value field has data-testid='step-duration-value'
FRONTEND: Duration unit field has data-testid='step-duration-unit'
FRONTEND: Partner submissions table shows 'Forecast' column header
FRONTEND: Partner submissions show forecast dates (15.04.2026 for Chris, 26.08.2026 for Demo User)
seed_data_creation: Step durations seeded: Step 1=0d (instant), Step 2=0d, Step 3=4w, Step 4=0d, Step 5=0d, Step 6=3m, Step 7=0d, Step 8=2w. Demo user has Step 1 completed so estimated completion includes Steps 2-8 durations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified Step Duration & Estimated Completion feature: 1) Each step has duration_value (int) and duration_unit (days/weeks/months/years), 2) calculate_estimated_completion() uses completed_at of last completed step as start date, then adds remaining step durations using python-dateutil relativedelta, 3) User dashboard shows banner with data-testid='estimated-completion-banner' and date with data-testid='estimated-completion-date', 4) Admin step editor has duration fields with data-testid='step-duration-value' and 'step-duration-unit', 5) Progress records now include started_at and completed_at timestamps. Chris (100% complete) has forecast 15.04.2026, Demo User (12% complete) has forecast 26.08.2026.
